Description: Базовая адресация, hostname, routing, simulated Internet/transit
ExpectedResult: Hostnames match the topology; core IP settings exist; simulated Internet node reachable.

Description: AD DS, additional DC, AD Sites, replication
ExpectedResult: Forest/domain exist; second DC present; sites and replication healthy.

Description: DNS forward/reverse records, PTR, DNS forwarding
ExpectedResult: Primary zones and reverse zones exist; PTRs and forwarders are configured.

Description: DHCP scopes, relay, dynamic DNS, client leases
ExpectedResult: Scopes are created; relay configured; clients receive leases from the correct scope.
Required OUs/groups/users exist; automation script and CSV are present.

Description: GPO baseline, Windows LAPS, minimal BitLocker recovery
ExpectedResult: Required GPOs exist; LAPS and BitLocker recovery backup are configured.
Shares and NTFS permissions match the task; drive mappings are available.

VerificationCommands: Get-ComputerInfo; git -C C:\Skills log --oneline -1; Test-Path C:\Skills\B1-selfcheck.txt
ExpectedResult: Clients are domain-joined; Git repository and self-check file exist.
